response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear on the resume. No GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or DNN training/inference optimization background is shown, and the educational path (BS + ~14 years experience) meets the minimum bar but lacks the specialized hardware focus typical for a Principal Performance Architect.
strengths: Long track record (14+ years) as a senior/staff software engineer
Some low-level/performance work in DLang with async I/O and high-throughput services
Experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware-software co-design experience
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or DNN optimization background
Skillset is application/web-focused, not hardware performance architecture

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
